chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The pausing upon Al Safa and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/70)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/70)
text: كُنْتُ وَرَاءَ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) عَلَى الصَّفَا أَوْ عَلَى الْمَرْوَةِ وَ هُوَ لَا يَزِيدُ عَلَى حَرْفَيْنِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ حُسْنَ الظَّنِّ بِكَ فِي كُلِّ حَالٍ وَ صِدْقَ النِّيَّةِ فِي التَّوَكُّلِ عَلَيْكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Ahmad Bin Al Jaham Al Khazzaz, from Muhammad Bin Uar Bin Yazeed, from one of his companions who said,

‘We were behind Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> upon Al-Safa, or upon Al-Marwa, and he<sup>asws</sup> did not increase upon two words: ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I ask You<sup>asws</sup> for having good thoughts about You<sup>azwj</sup> in every state, and truthful intentions during the reliance upon You<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Salih ibn abu Hammad from Ahmad ibn al-Jahm al-Khazzaz from Muhammad ibn ‘Umar ibn Yazid from certain individuals of his people who has said the following: “I was following abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when climbing al-Safa’ and al-Marwah, and he did not say anything more than two words, ‘O Allah, I appeal before You to grant me optimism about You in all conditions and true intention to place my trust with You.’”
